entries.response:
Here is a sample PlantUML diagram for a `Plant` class:
```
<class>
  <name>Plants</names>
  <groupId>1</groupId>
  <membershipId>2</membershipId>
</class>
```
This diagram should be clear, well-structured, and follow PlantUML best practices. The code should also include attributes for `id` (represented by a single line), `name`, `groupId`, `membershipId`, and the `memberID` attribute of each member.
